summary: Decent show with average performance, recording considered better than typical soundboard but no specific details
review: The reviewer finds the concert merely good—not outstanding—rating it a middling three stars. While they note the recording sounds better than a standard soundboard, there are no concrete comments on clarity or mix.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; the show is described as only “good” and the recording quality isn’t detailed, leading to a low‑confidence average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound clarity or mix; reviewer only implies it sounds better than typical soundboard recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall described as a decent but unremarkable performance.
